  3. Daania Hazli wins three titles at the ITF J30 Phnom Penh
Juniors

Daania Hazli wins three titles at the ITF J30 Phnom Penh

22 November 2025 · Bernama

Featured player: Daania Daniella Hazli

Malaysian junior Daania Daniella Hazli capped a productive 2025 with a title haul at the Under-18 ITF J30 Phnom Penh on the ITF World Tennis Tour Juniors.

She secured the girls’ singles with a 6-1, 6-3 win over China’s Zijie Yang. Partnering Singapore’s Chanya Ng Kai Ning, she then added the doubles crown with a 6-1, 6-3 victory over the China–Korea pairing of Yang Zican and Park Ha-an. Bernama reported the Phnom Penh haul as three titles for the young Malaysian.

The results extended a standout junior season that also included a J30 Surabaya singles title earlier in the year, building both her confidence and her ITF junior ranking points.

The timing was significant, with the wins coming shortly before the SEA Games — a marker of form as one of Malaysia’s leading junior girls headed into a major regional campaign.

Source: This is an original summary written by MalaysianOpenTennis.com from publicly reported facts. Read the full report at Bernama.
